phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Arco da Porta de Mós
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde consigo encontrar o Arco da Porta de Mós?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih koong-SEE-goo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Arches and gates are commonly integrated into the historic fortifications.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto às muralhas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the city walls.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the city walls.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto às muralhas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Miradouro das Portas de Moura is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro das Portas de Moura?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Miradouro is a viewpoint in the historic quarter.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro das Portas de Moura.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Miradouro das Portas de Moura.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Miradouro das Portas de Moura.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro das Portas de Moura.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Arco da Porta de Mós
phrases.text_local: Siga as placas para o Arco da Porta de Mós.
phrases.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH.
phrases.cultural_note: Arco da Porta de Mós is a medieval arch in the quarter.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco da Porta de Mós.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Arco da Porta de Mós.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Arco da Porta de Mós.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Arco da Porta de Mós.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Miradouro das Portas de Moura?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro ou pergunte a um guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the viewpoint or ask a local guide.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the viewpoint or ask a local guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro ou pergunte a um guia local.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DIH MOHW-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Beco da Alcaçova street is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho para o Beco da Alcaçova?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW BEH-koo DUH ahl-kuh-SAW-vuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Narrow alleys in Portuguese neighborhoods are often referred to locally as becos or ruelas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Beco da Alcaçova.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BEH-koo DUH ahl-kuh-SAW-vuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Beco da Alcaçova.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Beco da Alcaçova.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BEH-koo DUH ahl-kuh-SAW-vuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Beco da Alcaçova.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Arco da Porta de Mós is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente o Arco da Porta de Mós?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals often give directions based on the main street rather than side alleys.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Arco da Porta de Mós.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Arco da Porta de Mós.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Arco da Porta de Mós.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH MAWSH.
